title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates using Archon, a workflow framework that chains Claude Opus and Gemini 3.5 Flash for frontend development. Opus handles planning and copywriting while Gemini generates UI designs, then Opus completes integration and deployment.
